'''Mif Kumas''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Calibop]] [[Sergeant-at-Arms/Legends|Sergeant at Arms]] for the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]]. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], he quieted everyone down as [[Director/Legends|Director]] [[bel-dar-Nolek]] explained the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] attack on [[Obroa-skai/Legends|Obroa-skai]] at [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] [[Grand Convocation Chamber]]. By then he had held the position for two terms.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''
